title: Add structured planning and replanning policy objects for goal preconditions and remediation
description: Introduce a structured replanning/remediation contract (for example RecoveryPolicy or RemediationHint) and goal precondition/postcondition capabilities so the planner can make deterministic decisions rather than relying on free-text suggestions or implicit assumptions. This should cover CanAttempt/CanContinue semantics and structured outcomes for recovery/replanning. Source: Data/Pages/Audits/2026-06-30_memorysmith_llm_agent_architecture_execution_context_and_replanning_audit.md and Data/Pages/Audits/sprint-56-wave-b-audit.md.
